build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run --filter @mineradio/web build && bun run --filter @mineradio/desktop build:sidecar

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; media-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5173; script-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5173 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5173 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; media-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:5173; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: A GPL-3.0 Tauri rewrite shell for Mineradio.
